testcase.name: test_about_others_fires_correct_tool[How many employees does SMIFS have?-directory_org_stats]
test_about_others_fires_correct_tool[Who is in the COMPLIANCE department?-directory_search_employees]
test_about_others_fires_correct_tool[What departments exist at SMIFS?-directory_departments]

failure.message: AssertionError: 'What departments exist at SMIFS?' should fire directory_departments; got tools=[]; intent=KNOWLEDGE; btypes=['text'] assert 'directory_departments' in []
